# Stage 03: Search Strategy

core_claim_boundaries:
- Emphasize finite-size, constant-factor, robustness, and practical-control gains.
- Do not claim asymptotic improvement beyond known optimal kappa scaling without a
  formal lower-bound argument.
- Separate path-discovery gains from schedule-only gains.
extraction_schema:
  paper_fields:
  - citation_key
  - title
  - authors
  - year
  - venue
  - url
  - doi_or_arxiv
  - method_family
  - qlsp_model
  - path_family
  - schedule_family
  - kappa_scaling
  - epsilon_scaling
  - gap_dependence
  - constraints_supported
  - benchmark_matrices
  - limitations
  - relevance_to_AQ_draft
objective: 'Retrieve and verify literature for a paper framing QLSP improvement as
  a bilevel design problem: outer constrained search over physically valid Hamiltonian
  paths H(s; theta), and inner adaptive schedule/control over traversal along a fixed
  path.

  '
priority_questions:
  P0:
  - valid Hamiltonian path parameterizations for adiabatic QLSP
  - fixed-path schedule comparison: local adiabatic, constrained RL, differentiable
      optimal control
  - bilevel objective and evaluation protocol
  P1:
  - path-geometry analysis: gaps, integrated adiabatic proxies, transition elements,
      robustness
  - RL versus differentiable-control regime map
  - kappa-scaling barriers and negative results
  P2:
  - ancilla-assisted path families
  - optional real sparse matrix benchmarks
query_blocks:
  adiabatic_qlsp:
    intent: Establish canonical adiabatic QLSP constructions, correctness conditions,
      runtime scaling, and known path choices.
    queries:
    - adiabatic quantum algorithm linear systems condition number kappa Hamiltonian
      path
    - quantum linear systems adiabatic theorem local adiabatic schedule spectral gap
    - QLSP adiabatic quantum computing linear systems gap schedule
    - Subasi Somma Orsucci adiabatic quantum linear systems algorithm
  adiabatic_scheduling:
    intent: Compare analytic schedules and gap-aware schedules with learned controls.
    queries:
    - local adiabatic evolution schedule spectral gap Roland Cerf
    - adiabatic quantum computing schedule optimization minimum gap
    - spectral gap aware adiabatic schedule quantum control
    - adiabatic theorem integrated error bound transition matrix elements schedule
  ancilla_assisted_extensions:
    intent: Treat ancilla paths as optional extensions preserving projected QLSP correctness.
    queries:
    - ancilla assisted adiabatic quantum algorithm Hamiltonian embedding linear systems
    - block encoding quantum linear systems ancilla Hamiltonian simulation
    - postselection ancilla quantum linear systems algorithm adiabatic
  benchmarks:
    intent: Build AQ-QLSP PathBench around spectra, kappa, sparsity, bottlenecks,
      and b alignment.
    queries:
    - quantum linear systems benchmark matrix condition number sparse spectra
    - HHL benchmark matrices condition number right hand side alignment
    - adiabatic quantum algorithm benchmark spectral gap bottleneck
    - QLSP synthetic matrix families condition number sparsity benchmark
  hamiltonian_path_design:
    intent: Find work on interpolation-path design, catalysts, shortcuts, and path
      deformation.
    queries:
    - adiabatic path optimization Hamiltonian interpolation catalyst spectral gap
    - Hamiltonian path design adiabatic quantum computation gap amplification
    - nonlinear interpolation adiabatic quantum algorithm path optimization
    - catalyst Hamiltonian adiabatic algorithm spectral gap
  optimal_control:
    intent: Identify differentiable optimal-control baselines and constraints relevant
      to schedule/path optimization.
    queries:
    - GRAPE Krotov CRAB quantum optimal control adiabatic state preparation schedule
      constraints
    - differentiable quantum optimal control monotone schedule adiabatic evolution
    - quantum control spectral gap adiabatic passage optimization
  qlsp_lower_bounds_scaling:
    intent: Bound claims against known optimal dependence on condition number and
      precision.
    queries:
    - quantum linear systems lower bound condition number kappa optimal
    - quantum linear systems algorithm optimal kappa dependence Childs Kothari Somma
    - quantum singular value transformation linear systems kappa lower bound
    - HHL algorithm condition number scaling lower bound QLSP
  reinforcement_learning_quantum_control:
    intent: Position constrained RL as useful only where it beats or complements differentiable
      control.
    queries:
    - reinforcement learning quantum control adiabatic state preparation schedule
    - constrained reinforcement learning quantum optimal control Hamiltonian constraints
    - reinforcement learning adiabatic quantum computing schedule optimization
    - safe reinforcement learning quantum control monotonic schedule constraints
retrieval_sources:
  code_and_benchmarks:
  - GitHub
  - Papers with Code
  discovery:
  - Google Scholar
  - Semantic

... (truncated, see full artifact)
